action.reasoning: Observation: The baseline ResNet50 achieved 0.3655 balanced accuracy on the test set, but 0.8432 on the validation set (source domains). Analysis: There is a massive domain gap between the training locations and the test location. ResNet50 is overfitting to the source domains. Decision: Switch to a stronger backbone with better out-of-the-box domain generalization: CLIP ViT-B/16. I will also add strong data augmentations (ColorJitter, RandomAffine) to encourage invariance to lighting and background changes. I will train for 5 epochs to evaluate the improvement.
